name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: An announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, I couldn’t be prouder of how hard we worked to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Virginia Democrats up and down the ticket. 2020 hasn’t always been easy, but by standing together, we proved that hope always defeats fear. Unity always triumphs over division. As we look toward 2021, I’m more optimistic than ever about Virginia’s future. **In fact, I'd like a chance to speak directly to you about what I'm hoping we can accomplish together in 2021. Tomorrow night, I’m holding an online event to talk directly with grassroots supporters like you.** **[Will you click here to RSVP and let me know you’re coming? My team will follow up with details on how you can join the event.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm_1UFF843nXDqY_XruIeAl7YYwBaybfOjRZ6aXKymq_EqyCO-0FDIVrBYHCbCAZ05fehwDN9Dilzx_JaUNpfUjMu-d068e4G7FpWsvRImrU8A82jHtTCaN1GsdUgIIMmNvsO1Kt7OlF2lG-0Jc4wGLoKYMOg52POl-8bUPgYUFEAGjnjJCbtun6vG_uYL3vstfSw5lmMspz9aa7TsA4mOzBGEM5P4BRFiUppY3cOkIya6eBhU14ZwaIzW4D05CIrca2UjC5htO-h_-0KkJsD9_/37k/ChRS9iyxSou4j44dOJfhBQ/h0/aytNg1R9IUGkFEl8ICZO313Jnyw_oz6iGCbXofO-1s0) ** Talk to you soon. subject: ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX NEWS TO HIGHLIGHT STAKES OF HER RACE, RADICAL AGENDA OF RAPHAEL WARNOCK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 9, 2020 ICYMI: KELLY LOEFFLER JOINS FOX NEWS TO HIGHLIGHT STAKES OF HER RACE, RADICAL AGENDA OF RAPHAEL WARNOCK
ATLANTA - Yesterday, conservative businesswoman and political outsider Kelly Loeffler joined Martha MacCallum on The Story to discuss the high stakes of her Senate runoff race that will determine the direction of our state and country. Senator Loeffler also slammed her opponent, Raphael Warnock, for his radical anti-police, anti-military, anti-America agenda.

| December 2020 Newsletter

| | | |

Friends, Happy Holidays! As we head into the holiday season, please remember to remain vigilant about safety in light of the pandemic. While this may result in more separation this year than what we would like, we must continue to make strides that help us to combat the rising caseload of COVID-19 infections and related mortality. Let's make a strong push this holiday season to put the safety of others first!

---
| | | |
---
---
CHECK OUT THE NEXT EPISODE OF THE EDWARDS EMPOWERMENT TALKS PODCAST!
---
In response to the need to inspire and empower people during these challenging times, I recently launched my podcast, The Edwards Empowerment Talks! Through this platform, I invite inspiring guests to tell their personal stories of perseverance and defying the odds to encourage my listeners and viewers to stay focused and dig deep in order to do the same in their own lives. I also invite guests whose community work will equip listeners and viewers with the tools to impact change in their own community, as well. Please make sure to SUBSCRIBE TODAY by clicking [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9lnxDrSaCBO6ApjKbIuTrqQW3oQ02j9SwwTlWwx5ww_cpTrHG0Q6qZp_WADWgVpbCu463FvFm3IWWti37I6ukyqne2CPQvnJLbmRe2OHFjfHsZFQpxyzkdAJC9vZyAAAulGLwLoqp-dktAjfNVvSCJhsSrjr7ke&c=LhSAKFUmjNSkXAOjh7Op8oSvkigyYNNEKgo2RNWncJZxmqg4u76BQw==&ch=fQvkWL9uYOh8EOfW7TawCemQUbhl7cS_wT-SoyZkdmn0nT6fqc8s5Q==).

Our Recent Episodes Include: Bakari Sellers, Political Commentator, Author & Public Servant:

| | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9lnxDrSaCBO6ApjKbIuTrqQW3oQ02j9SwwTlWwx5ww_cpTrHG0Q6rtDLGGMDBZEoJTCzhg_0C9IdzgexxaJQ6c1uJJrQA7LqJmaP_kcGbBkW1g0nIF5ciqxI-f08VA5nzbbOgyg-bVBJhKoXjI1vM-C8bN-gqHjLVRl7O2XfuaVplWban5J3g==&c=LhSAKFUmjNSkXAOjh7Op8oSvkigyYNNEKgo2RNWncJZxmqg4u76BQw==&ch=fQvkWL9uYOh8EOfW7TawCemQUbhl7cS_wT-SoyZkdmn0nT6fqc8s5Q==)
---
In Episode 06 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has a fascinating conversation with Bakari Sellers, a CNN political commentator, New York Times best-selling author and public servant. Bakari's journey as a public servant and top political commentator was fueled by his passion to be a change agent, a goal instilled in him by his parents during his youth. Although he has faced a variety of challenges on his path, he considers "winning the day" as a personal goal in balancing his media work, community and legal work, marriage and fatherhood. Bakari is no stranger to being the youngest in the room, but as his family's roots in the Civil Rights Movement and his own journey have shown, young people have the power to change the world. Bakari's drive to achieve has been a mixed bag of motivation to make a difference and anxiety about failing. Bakari uses his personal struggles with anxiety to encourage people to use their own challenges as a means to propel themselves forward. If you have ever hesitated to dream boldly or doubted what you could accomplish for yourself and the community, this is one episode you do not want to miss!

Hon. Curtis Graves, Civil Rights Leader & Former Texas State House Representative
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9lnxDrSaCBO6ApjKbIuTrqQW3oQ02j9SwwTlWwx5ww_cpTrHG0Q6rtDLGGMDBZEVjodQsE1oP8FaptgnKUVukK7QWIKpAR26aOd21E73VDlstdRmYVS4vxLsC98iSWKjDrdflTZmklZ33RuvcHR7zSf98tQvNXpWGZMBdRTb4z00qZX4gls9w==&c=LhSAKFUmjNSkXAOjh7Op8oSvkigyYNNEKgo2RNWncJZxmqg4u76BQw==&ch=fQvkWL9uYOh8EOfW7TawCemQUbhl7cS_wT-SoyZkdmn0nT6fqc8s5Q==)

| | In Episode 07 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an enlightening conversation with The Honorable Curtis Graves, a Civil Rights leader and public servant. After leading student sit-ins as a Texas Southern University student, Curtis Graves became a Texas State Representative and served the public. Curtis Graves' journey as a Civil Rights leader began in his youth while in New Orleans. In his childhood, he came across leaders like A.P. Tureaud, Ambassador Andrew Young and Supreme Court Justice Thurgood Marshall. Having personal experience with barriers to voting (ranging from poll taxes to discretionary reading tests) that Blacks faced in this country, Curtis Graves was determined to create a community that embraced justice as opposed to oppression. Through this Episode, listeners and viewers will appreciate that activism requires strategy that must accompany clear aims. They will also be inspired to be the change that they wish to see in their own communities. Activism and public service are not always easy feats but can be deeply rewarding. In this Episode, Curtis Graves details the mixed journey of trials & tribulations, successes, setbacks and the courage needed to impact change during the Civil Rights Movement. In listening to his stories, listeners will learn how easy it is for history to repeat itself if you don't know it and how to navigate what may seem like uncharted waters. Curtis Graves' uncanny storytelling ability and rich knowledge of history will inspire you as you navigate today's trying times. This is one Episode you do not want to miss!

In Episode 08 of The Edwards Empowerment Talks podcast, Amanda Edwards has an extraordinary conversation with Lauren Anderson. After hard work, discipline and dedication, Lauren Anderson defied the odds to become the first Black principal ballerina in the Houston Ballet and one of the first Black principal ballerinas of a major ballet company in the United States. After being told early on that she did not have the proper physique for ballet, Lauren Anderson was devastated and once considered ending her dance training. However, her early dream of one day moving to New York and dancing there, motivated her to continue to work hard. Her hard work paid off in a way she never imagined. She became a professional dancer with the Houston Ballet, and ultimately became a soloist and then she became the principal dancer of the company. She made history by becoming the first Black principal ballerina of the Houston Ballet and one of the first Black principal ballerinas in a major ballet company in the United States. She now lives out another dream of hers, which is teaching at the Houston Ballet and bringing dance to all communities - including those areas that are under-resourced. In this Episode, Lauren details her challenges on and off the stage, and provides viewers and listeners with sage life advice stemming directly from her experiences. She speaks about overcoming negative self-talk and how to be more focused realizing your potential and achieving your goals. Lauren's story will inspire listeners and viewers to dream boldly and to focus on the work and focus needed to achieve their dreams and beyond. Lauren is funny, authentic, wise, encouraging and honest. This is one Episode you do not want to miss!

ON THE ISSUES: INNOVATION RENNAISANCE DURING THE PANDEMIC
In August 2020, I published my Op-Ed with The Texas Signal about the opportunity that the pandemic presents to spark an innovation renaissance. Through this piece I made the case that we should use this time to make a clarion call to action to reimagine the myriad systems that fail Americans with respect to issues ranging from the small business ownership to the digital divide in our country. Given the resemblance that this pandemic has with that of the Great Depression, much like The New Deal, we should act in bold, decisive and innovative ways that transform our country for the better. To access this Op-Ed, please click [here.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y9lnxDrSaCBO6ApjKbIuTrqQW3oQ02j9SwwTlWwx5ww_cpTrHG0Q6rtDLGGMDBZEt7ufnkjaMVLrUTc5gF5rFip3hl8310uQsXbhBY0sUP2yDagteAKcu1jWgl5t4mP7ghkZyy_Wn4v2ZFyvzHtzZMdOyr8b4zXvrelIr5o5lirnwlje2uT2VBti_YAZtrMHhvAgkFpsqqVM5bxYubyLNipSR7adBr7D5RB6nfA38Nk=&c=LhSAKFUmjNSkXAOjh7Op8oSvkigyYNNEKgo2RNWncJZxmqg4u76BQw==&ch=fQvkWL9uYOh8EOfW7TawCemQUbhl7cS_wT-SoyZkdmn0nT6fqc8s5Q==)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: **KEEP GEORGIA RED FUND**
body:

clean_body: I am honored to serve you and to continue fighting for you in Congress == Friend, Almost a year ago, Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the rest of the Radicals in Congress fought to impeach President Trump. That is when it became clear to me that the Democrat Party valued the politics of revenge more than fighting for a Strong America and doing what was right. At that moment, I decided to walk away from the Democrat Party, and I haven't looked back since. I am serious about supporting President Trump, protecting hard working middle-class families in South Jersey and fighting for a Strong America. I knew that joining the Republican Party was the right thing to do. Your support means the world to me, and if we are going to continue to push back against the socialist agenda of the Radical Left in Congress, I need your continued support. == == == == I am a proud Republican, and walking away from the Democrat Party was one of the best decisions I have ever made. I am honored to serve you and to continue fighting for a Strong America and a Strong South Jersey in Congress. Thank you for your support, Congressman Jeff Van Drew Would you like to stay in touch with Team VanDrew? Follow us on == == Paid for by Van Drew for Congress. Friend,

All eyes are on Georgia.

**My friend Senator Kelly Loeffler is in a tough fight for reelection and she needs your help - RIGHT NOW.**

Her runoff campaign is facing its first major hurdle this week, the mid-month fundraising deadline, and the Democrats are already surging ahead.

**[Will you chip in to help meet this goal and beat the Democrats?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p32hh_cOQZrmnDQlXipKBI-XWztk1lCk134-o_bs_TBqcyxLLxcLm9sR7r7S_1O1sqclBuPD_1ymt7WwC3ZS08Td0ENfuF0ellHi20TKayr8YznZ__stqvJXhi848B8j3VKPGKn3VZzgIbhoPxbSXUCmSHxs7CGBUWcIHU90m_2UfOtoQPwWvPyuyPhqIFsxahqVH3X1yImaBt_-BXnIYSJG9l3bobplu7R1CIB20QofDBu7QUrsfjGz9WUs7SexopEEhHG3MWOjOU3jCUyA4IVowMrlRDNmXLHvbkx21PWfFPb90_0RtHJI2s1IHN9tlrGWrLUYKGzqy5mk7uv0UoTAHYFJ7wmAmrn9yeRd2idZIyrDcC88g2xLS-sVI6nxEoC9Wk7B9LvieQRa88J4tO6m4KqSmUNc&c=Un7ZaTkHmm4yahkYo7vARp9dktp2a49KsBTtYSMk5y_NITp6iYTJ3Q==&ch=9mgJcFNEh7jUMJ8g0ZUghMu5k-Ibn7psZHOq__Q1lbk8872EFSisGw==) Your donation will be 7x matched!**

We need to help Kelly start her runoff effort as fast as possible, and the mid-month fundraising deadline could make or break it. That's why we're activating a special match offer to multiply the effectiveness of your donation.

**Don 't let the Democrats turn Georgia blue.** They want to bring back the failed liberal ideas of the Obama years and keep going even further to the left.

[**Will you chip in any amount to help Kelly beat her mid-month fundraising goal and get started on her runoff to beat the Democrats?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p32hh_cOQZrmnDQlXipKBI-XWztk1lCk134-o_bs_TBqcyxLLxcLm9sR7r7S_1O1sqclBuPD_1ymt7WwC3ZS08Td0ENfuF0ellHi20TKayr8YznZ__stqvJXhi848B8j3VKPGKn3VZzgIbhoPxbSXUCmSHxs7CGBUWcIHU90m_2UfOtoQPwWvPyuyPhqIFsxahqVH3X1yImaBt_-BXnIYSJG9l3bobplu7R1CIB20QofDBu7QUrsfjGz9WUs7SexopEEhHG3MWOjOU3jCUyA4IVowMrlRDNmXLHvbkx21PWfFPb90_0RtHJI2s1IHN9tlrGWrLUYKGzqy5mk7uv0UoTAHYFJ7wmAmrn9yeRd2idZIyrDcC88g2xLS-sVI6nxEoC9Wk7B9LvieQRa88J4tO6m4KqSmUNc&c=Un7ZaTkHmm4yahkYo7vARp9dktp2a49KsBTtYSMk5y_NITp6iYTJ3Q==&ch=9mgJcFNEh7jUMJ8g0ZUghMu5k-Ibn7psZHOq__Q1lbk8872EFSisGw==)

Georgians deserve a strong conservative voice in the Senate, and my friend Kelly Loeffler is the woman for the job.

My very best,

Nikki Haley

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: It's Stacey Abrams' birthday - and here's what she would like!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219eb/3401959131/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Good morning Georgia! **Today we 're excited to wish our founder Stacey Abrams a very happy birthday.** Join us in celebrating this special day by requesting your mail ballot for the January 5 runoffs at [**ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219e8/3401959131/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov"). **Already requested your mail ballot?** Fantastic... she will be so happy! You can confirm your ballot was mailed out to you and sign up for updates at [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219e9/3401959131/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter"). If you've already received your ballot, don't wait; follow the enclosed instructions and complete it now. Don't forget to sign the oath on the outside of the return envelope. Once you're done, drop it off at [a drop box in your county](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219f6/3401959131/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/") or at [your county's elections office](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219f7/3401959131/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). You can also mail it-- just make sure you do so right away! Once you've dropped off or mailed your ballot, go to [georgia.ballottrax.net/voter](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219e9/3401959131/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://georgia.ballottrax.net/voter") to make sure your ballot is received and accepted. **Snap a picture of yourself requesting or returning your mail ballot (be sure to conceal your private information) and post it on social media with the hashtag #HappyBirthdayStacey. It will be the best birthday surprise! Even better? Once you 're done posting, encourage others to request or return their ballot! ** Thank you for making this day special. \- Team Fair Fight P.S. If you have any questions or experience an issue with [ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219e8/3401959131/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://ballotrequest.sos.ga.gov"), don't worry! Call the Voter Protection Hotline at 888-730-5816 for help. You can also visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4d4/34a064cc/1aed4679/70219f4/3401959131/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com") for more information. |
---|---|---

name: MAGASOTA
subject: Save Christmas! A Call To Action
body:
| Peter \-- As we wind down 2020 our state continues to be ruled by tyrannical mandates. Invasive and unconstitutional restrictions on our liberties during Thanksgiving proves the Governor of Minnesota has no restraint. He wants to control every aspect of our lives including what we do in our homes. _Shutting down any business does NOT fix Covid 19._ _Isolating and limiting friends and family does NOT fix Covid 19._ **History is repeating itself.** Hopefully you remember the extreme measures Governor Walz took last winter. You should expect to see the same thing this winter and spring. We have little hope that he will lift the current mandates on gyms, bars and restaurants. What we do expect is more extreme mandates after the holiday season. _We expect our churches will once again become the target of Walz' unconstitutional extreme mandates._ I'm encouraging you to join Michael Matt of The Remnant Newspaper, this Saturday December 12th at 10:30 a.m. for a rally to save Christmas. This will be held at the State Capitol. Michael Matt is an amazing man of courage. Please click on the link below for details. https://remnantnewspaper.com/web/index.php/articles/item/5179-call-to-action-savechristmas-rally **I still have complete faith that our beloved President Donald J Trump will remain our President.** Send a Christmas card with words of encouragement: The President The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20500 This is the email: president@whitehouse.gov Are you wondering how these unconstitutional mandates in this state will ever end? _**The solution is not complying**_. _At whatever cost we must not comply._ The majority of our representatives have proven to be helpless and even hopeless. The citizens of this state that believe in the constitution and it's guaranteed rights need to support each other in defying these mandates! _I pray for your courage to do the right thing._ **It is the responsibility of "we the people" to save this great country**. We cannot place that responsibility onto anyone except ourselves. Have a Merry Christmas. Pray for our President, our country and for brave hearts. -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_christmas&n=1)
---
-=-=- MAGASOTA · MN 55372, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.magasota.com/unsubscribe?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_christmas&n=2). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_christmas&n=3), software for leaders.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: No one is working harder
body:
Open this email to see how you can help Judicial Watch!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch has won significant battles here in Washington _against_ political corruption and _for_ the rule of law which is why I ask you to **_[join our fight by making a tax deductible donation](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=)_** today.
In 2016 President Trump called for "draining the swamp" in Washington, DC...something we've been doing for 26 years, and we stood with him...
On illegal immigration, we supported the President's efforts to respect federal immigration laws and protect Americans against imported drugs, crime and terrorism and relieve us of the enormous taxpayer-funded costs associated with providing public services for millions of illegal aliens... _but there is so much more to do_.
Like you, I am especially fearful and angry when corrupt state politicians and arrogant liberal mayors, boards of supervisors and/or sheriffs maintain _unlawful and deadly illegal alien sanctuary policies_ ...
...or when Deep State operatives deep within our permanent federal government agencies unlawfully targeted President Trump and his administration officials who challenged corruption and unlawful government secrecy... and when corrupt politicians like Joe Biden, Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton and former FBI and DOJ top officials think they can get away with criminal activity.
You are already helping us pursue justice on these critical battlefronts. And it continues to be no easy task.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=)
---

That's why I'm especially proud that Judicial Watch is having more impact fighting corruption and government secrecy now than in any other period since opening our doors in 1994. _And 2020 has already proved to be even more pivotal_ :
* We filed no fewer than 7 lawsuits against U.S. government agencies to get to the truth about the corrupt Hunter Biden-Burisma Holdings company relationship and then-Vice President Joe Biden's use of American aid dollars to put an end to the investigation of Burisma Holdings in Ukraine... _and we 're now putting the same level of focus on the Hunter/Joe Biden shenanigans in China_!

* Court-ordered releases of emails, other documents and sworn testimony to Judicial Watch continue to shed light on Hillary Clinton's corrupt State Department. _We literally altered the course of history_ in 2016 with our _first_ massive investigation into her email and pay-to-play scandals, and we _continue_ to force releases of documents the American people have a right to see!

* _Having filed more than 65 separate lawsuits_ against government agencies and departments we continue to "turn over every rock" uncovering the Deep State conspiracy to torpedo the Trump presidency that reached from the highest levels of the former Obama administration to deep within our "permanent government" and liberal mainstream media. _The truth about this attempted coup must be_ exposed (because election results have no impact on our commitment to holding corrupt public officials accountable).

* Our history-making work protecting the honesty of our elections is now helping disrupt the Left's plans. To help prevent voter fraud, we continue to successfully sue states who fail to clean their voter rolls of dead, moved and other ineligible voters. In 2019 we reached an historic legal settlement with California and Los Angeles County to remove up to 1.59 million registered names from the county's voter rolls, a _nd we are now suing Colorado, North Carolina and Pennsylvania over their failure to clean their voter rolls_.

* Our immigration law enforcement work continues to lead the nation's wars against illegal immigration as we fight in the courts to overturn sanctuary policies. This is essential work, since hundreds of liberal jurisdictions ignored Trump administration efforts to shut down sanctuary policies. Judicial Watch is scheduled to go to trial in April of 2021 in a challenge of San Francisco's infamous and deadly sanctuary policy. We also filed a lawsuit against a similar sanctuary policy in Santa Clara County, California. _The outcome of these lawsuits will have a potentially historic impact on the illegal immigration debate_.

Overall, no one is working harder than your Judicial Watch to drain the swamp in Washington, fight illegal immigration and illegal sanctuary policies, and hold powerful politicians accountable to the American people under the law.

**_And that why I ask you to join our fight by making your best_**[**tax-deductible contribution to Judicial Watch now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=)** _._**

Our nation needs us even more, and [**I am counting on you to join our fight**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=). Our work has never been more important - _or urgent_! Thank you for whatever you can [**donate**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=).

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton

President, Judicial Watch

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52236&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEyMDkxNTE0MzI=)

subject: Ex-Con Hired by D.C. as Violence Interrupter Arrested, Charged with Murder
body:
In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading.

# [Ex-Con Hired by D.C. as Violence Interrupter Arrested, Charged with Murder](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52237&L=21432&F=H&)
In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with. Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven public safety work that can avoid using police.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52237&L=21432&F=H&)
|

| |

### [The Potential Electoral College Gridlock ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52237&L=21434&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL2VsZWN0b3JhbC1jb2xsZWdlLWdyaWRsb2NrLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMjA5MTUyNzAx) Judicial Watch Last Friday’s Weekly Update with Tom Fitton focused on the electoral college, and Congress’ role in determining the outcome of the still-disputed election. As Fitton has explained in previous Weekly Updates, states like Pennsylvania could have a dueling slate of electors. In other words, a situation in which the state appoints two different sets of electors; one slate appointed by the Republican state legislature and one slate from the Democratic Governor. clean_body: In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. | | | Because no one is above the law! | December 09, 2020 ---|---|--- | | == == In a curious twist, a “reformed” criminal hired by the District of Columbia’s chief legal officer to help curb violence has been arrested and charged with murder. The case involves a taxpayer-funded public safety program known as Cure the Streets launched by D.C. Attorney General Karl Racine to reduce gun violence by treating it as a disease that can be interrupted and stopped from spreading. Cure the Streets typically hires men and women with criminal histories as violence interrupters because they know first-hand about the challenges that residents of crime-infested communities live with. Racine, who was reelected to a second term in 2018, says the transformed criminals hired by his program perform community-driven public safety work that can avoid using police. == | | | = Forbes Tom Fitton, the president of the conservative advocacy group Judicial Watch, told CNN his organization is against the mandate, saying it “may violate the law for Nasdaq to seemingly require a discriminatory quota system for race and gender.” In September, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit aimed at blocking the California law. = Judicial Watch Last Friday’s Weekly Update with Tom Fitton focused on the electoral college, and Congress’ role in determining the outcome of the still-disputed election. As Fitton has explained in previous Weekly Updates, states like Pennsylvania could have a dueling slate of electors. In other words, a situation in which the state appoints two different sets of electors; one slate appointed by the Republican state legislature and one slate from the Democratic Governor. = Washington Examiner Noncitizens are embedded in North Carolina jury and voting pools, raising new questions about the integrity of elections, according to an immigration reform group. = == == = = | CLIPS = TWEETS | | | | | ---|---|--- The year before he knowingly peddled false allegations about Russia collusion against @RealDonaldTrump, coup cabal member Rep. Swalwell was warned by FBI about his association with a suspected Chinese communist agent, who raised money for him and placed an intern in his office. 10:57 PM · Dec 8, 2020 | | | | | ---|---|--- Two Biden Cabinet picks played role in corrupt Clinton pardon operation. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: I'm running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwbHErI2SZehwPoSCE-boyH_I8ye-Gb6FIJqNdXxRP50P7tOWvE2dRLbfdkIKz4rt3YeNkZ_8h-wV2TtTUMe3fnrxuUDuH7DDTOQ_QvJR8_JjAK-9c415DdHzH5Ya5IwE4jogki3aowVuOLUMT9xUGBpJpU_PgzRUTM6a63yV9r344Ag4ziBbGWjZFoZ0SN-nxHNaWoz1qDic8K-gH4u2cfu-Z23Er2A-boMD8Cy0AXCgjK0LBVJrLhhupZOFVm5NcMcKIJboDj_yahi15_rtap2-Fug6PpfEfs8PqCQrh3zzg/37k/ZjA_7rmKRqCsMMEGlSGLTw/h0/2BPpE_LlkYXwT1mug_v_2XdZWULWO4cWtWX1vc2-gKo)
Derek, I’ll get right to the point: **Derek, I'm announcing that I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia and I’m humbly asking for your support.** **[Please chip in anything you can afford right now and become one of the very first donors to my campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwZCfae5bB7oMf1cPc6SUMktTYx9opvJhz81yLEvwA79hS87VqgzqZDK7TD9B3RZeGzXuGgmaT7bh1dtJBtdbo7ZvaYJrZnj2nhZwuXwP-U4tfMNcSbyaGZQmBYm-ddDerX5eJx3dHeB8A7TEzCbrTTDKmpkfjEuVtcUoqlI_LmqOY5WKu5phJTOGYTAu3IQ_h2RtGX42lHgOvp8jcH6_n_N0Pq_L7G9CPiJmoQwoTMjNnKeehiDtp6CfYbWh8cSIm4slNumZdsXyfQpYjRjjJi8Vmv0cLhAJz70TQfV6ydm_g/37k/ZjA_7rmKRqCsMMEGlSGLTw/h1/bX5UL1cs-11JvZSoF9TLpcDLglkovRxpe3cQgmW_Z_o)** If you know me, you know I’m an eternal optimist. But even I can’t sugarcoat it: 2020 was a tough year. To defeat COVID-19 and build an economy that truly works for all Virginians, we can’t just go back to business as usual. We need to think big, be bold, and approach our challenges as never before if we’re going to move the Commonwealth forward. I’m running to be that bold leader. That’s why I’m making my announcement at an elementary school today -- I am committed to making a historic investment in Virginia’s students, schools, and educators so we can finally ensure an equitable, world-class education for every Virginia child. I want to create good 21st Century jobs and build a future that lifts up all Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Our future can’t wait. This pandemic has given us big challenges, but it’s also given us a big opportunity. It’s up to us to make it count - and I know we can do it together, just like we have before. **Because you fought by my side, we defeated radical, right-wing forces who wanted to take Virginia backward. We defended women’s rights and access to healthcare, created 200,000 good-paying jobs, and restored voting rights to hundreds of thousands of Virginians.** Mine was the most progressive administration in the history of the Commonwealth and it’s because of grassroots supporters like you. With so much on the line, it’s more important than ever for us to stop these forces again. With you by my side, I know we can do it. **Derek, I hope I can count on your support again today.****[If you're with me, please, make sure our campaign gets off on the right foot. Will you chip in whatever you can now and help us start this morning strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwaFT4VmF2o2vxtabys9zLqvomhN2PlYiK2vShWN0oW8paOdhsGhLuGRxmb_WLF19wIGbKG8hAdOvsN3zcczYADPwiTsoIZ0ij_O1xP44rJwFB9d4Njrb19FnsUHIUfIdQSGFvZiIhbOb9Adbv7zKIdgiY7uMnuZey8RtEdhVwJ0HZyg11oVJR43tf4w7YZpOGFFuDnPn6ehS-MRfAvBf_IUWe4EuqIm_vDC8ifB4VzQtItKXxmPo_b9SjneUc4HjlbLEY1X1lTTXb2CUqJc_zECFxbXTK9TZtc21BEbBlXVoQ/37k/ZjA_7rmKRqCsMMEGlSGLTw/h2/59cm_t25HS8p6DuTqMvGnifNine4zq0DCwfKx-78UXo)** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwZwuAfPXFqRq_9k5bXG_0O6S8HSLPBN-y-llnB2JTcaDRRpbpjyOyYnnsN5vm9pa_eZtwoNV69GOpxc0K380RGg-OahHvnBkTcRANTLYr2UNZR5xcBQeX0Whl9bO7dt8xkP8K_udiLcHaXsR7ru0E9UqEzjp66ZcQn9IuTZErTvzBRmjyl6kvsqX6KK27B-rmBdetBLAebXsyoHhkad8277OPK2sJfW5bnVtc1LYa3fQM2mbcciYQGq0J-_Bw_pLc4Gklh8q7qeSCIOPXlbOh7j0qR_vFwOz1db3u-GDKp0yddyIdCM9KXRoc5G7VlBVNg/37k/ZjA_7rmKRqCsMMEGlSGLTw/h3/Y-n4procC8d9q_J9YslqU04U9Ib-FpW9Ny1AA5yx-Q0)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The next three months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't fundraise for at least three months.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-) Friend, The freeze is coming -- that's why I wanted to reach out right now. Friday is the last day to make sure we have the resources needed to get through the upcoming legislative session. Friday at midnight all donations must stop for at least 90 days. It's the last time you'll get a fundraising email from me for the next three months, and we have huge plans to combat climate change, create more economic opportunity, and respond to the COVID-19 crisis in Washington state while Washington, D.C. continues to stall. **Our opponents who want to organize against progress can still accept money hand-over-fist while legislators work hard in Olympia -- that's why I'm reaching out.[We have a pre-freeze goal of raising $30,000 by midnight on Friday: Will you donate $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13909?t=4&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13910?t=5&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13911?t=6&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13912?t=7&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13913?t=8&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13914?t=9&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13909?t=10&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---
I'm so proud of the work we're doing here in Washington state: We're taking monumental steps to set the foundation for the next generation of progressive leaders and the future of the climate movement. And we're working day and night to keep folks safe from COVID-19 and to keep small businesses supported during this critical time.
While we had some big wins this election season (thanks to you!), we didn't secure the supermajority we needed to be assured we'd have the votes to execute on our big plans for Washington state. With the freeze coming, our opponents will use this time to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars to defeat the progress Washingtonians are depending on.
$30,000 will go a long way to supporting that work while we can't raise any contributions -- that's why I'm asking, right now:
**[Will you donate $5 or more before Friday's freeze deadline? I won't ask again for three months, and we can't fall short -- every dollar makes a difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13909?t=11&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)**
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/13909?t=12&akid=8226%2E868730%2EM-_ja-)
---

subject: The Criminal Justice System in New York City Is Rotten
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANOS MARTON FOR DISTRICT ATTORNEY
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=494ed97d73&e=7758ed002e)
---
| | Hey Peter \-- Last week, I had the pleasure of being interviewed by Jacobin Magazine to speak of the importance of our campaign and our movement:
---
| [ ](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=8b15f5986b&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [__**CLICK HERE TO READ THE ENTIRE INTERVIEW >>**__](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=47d9a65aea&e=7758ed002e) As Manhattan DA, I will enact reforms that sets an example for the rest of the country - from ending the war on drugs to punishing corporations that participate in wage theft. [_**Read the interview and then rush a donation to our campaign to end the bygone era of our current punitive criminal justice system.**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=196b04078a&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [Donate $20.20 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=c9b3a072d3&e=7758ed002e "Donate $20.20 >>")
---
| [Donate $50 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=0c04a49d7b&e=7758ed002e "Donate $50 >>")
---
| [Donate $100 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=adeeff773b&e=7758ed002e "Donate $100 >>")
---
| [Donate a custom amount >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=9849aac630&e=7758ed002e "Donate a custom amount >>")
---
| I’m in this fight because I know what it’s like to be indiscriminately punished in our current system. **I grew up a brown teenager in Rudy Giuliani’s New York, and I have personally experienced the indignities of stop and frisk.** The breadth of my career experience has allowed me to understand how broken our criminal legal system is, from top to bottom, and how much of it we need to dismantle to truly reverse mass incarceration. **What we can’t have, however, is two systems of justice:** one for the rich and powerful, the other for low-income communities of color. And that’s what this campaign - this movement - is all about. It’s time to enact equal justice under the law - and not just supply empty rhetoric to win elections. [_**We’re taking on the billionaire class this election, so we need grassroots Democrats like you to help fund our fight to end the politics of the past. It’s time to bring our criminal justice system into the 21st century. Can you donate now to keep our fight going strong?**_](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=1fed0e7368&e=7758ed002e)
---
| [Donate $20.20 >>](https://janosforda.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=275c2ec80365ed02bae607247&id=300109a709&e=7758ed002e "Donate $20.20 >>")

---

Progressive Democrat for Manhattan District Attorney**

**Email Mississippi AG Fitch - Ask to Join Texas Election Lawsuit**
| |
---
| | On Monday, December 7 the State of Texas filed a lawsuit with the US Supreme Court claiming Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin violated the Electors Clause of the Constitution because they made changes to voting rules and procedures through the courts or through executive actions, but not through the state legislatures.The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is asking the Mississippi Attorney General to join with the State of Texas in a lawsuit.
---
| |
---
| | _Attorney General Lynn Fitch,_
_On Monday, December 7 the state of Texas filed a lawsuit with the US Supreme Court arguing that Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin violated the Electors Clause of the Constitution because they made changes to voting rules and procedures through the courts, through executive actions but not through the state legislatures.

Because these states violated US Law and the laws of their states, the people of Mississippi stand to be disenfranchised from their rightful position to participate in a fair election for the President of the United States. It is imperative that every state follow the law and ensure their elections are fair.

I ask you to join with Texas in this fight to ensure the election for President is above reproach and that the votes cast by the people of Mississippi are given their proper weight and importance._ _Thank you,_ __
---
| |
---
| | Please Click the link below, complete the form and your name will be added and an email automatically sent to AG Fitch.
---
| |
---
| | Please Click the link below, complete the form and your name will be added and an email automatically sent to AG Fitch.
---

clean_body: Patriot, , Ask Mississippi AG to Join Texas Election Lawsuit | | | | | | | | | Email Mississippi AG Fitch - Ask to Join Texas Election Lawsuit | | | | On Monday, December 7 the State of Texas filed a lawsuit with the US Supreme Court claiming Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin violated the Electors Clause of the Constitution because they made changes to voting rules and procedures through the courts or through executive actions, but not through the state legislatures.The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is asking the Mississippi Attorney General to join with the State of Texas in a lawsuit. | | | | Attorney General Lynn Fitch, On Monday, December 7 the state of Texas filed a lawsuit with the US Supreme Court arguing that Georgia, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin violated the Electors Clause of the Constitution because they made changes to voting rules and procedures through the courts, through executive actions but not through the state legislatures. Because these states violated US Law and the laws of their states, the people of Mississippi stand to be disenfranchised from their rightful position to participate in a fair election for the President of the United States. It is imperative that every state follow the law and ensure their elections are fair. I ask you to join with Texas in this fight to ensure the election for President is above reproach and that the votes cast by the people of Mississippi are given their proper weight and importance. Thank you, | | | | Please Click the link below, complete the form and your name will be added and an email automatically sent to AG Fitch. | | | | Please Click the link below, complete the form and your name will be added and an email automatically sent to AG Fitch. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends for Dana Criswell PO Box 1321 Olive Branch, MS 38654 Dana@DanaCriswell.net | | | | |

Hi Derek, I wanted to take a minute to reach out to you about Terry. If you don't know my husband, I'd like to tell you a bit about him and why he's running for Governor. Terry always puts people first. He's never been afraid to do the right thing and fight for the big, progressive ideas that change people’s lives. Terry leads with his heart and, with so many struggling right now because of COVID-19, we need that leadership now more than ever. But here’s the thing. We may have fired Donald Trump in 2020, but Virginia Republicans are doing everything they can to keep Trumpism alive and well in the Commonwealth. In fact, the National Republican Governors Association has already made Virginia their number one target of 2021. **It's why I've talked with Terry's team about setting a goal to find 2,500 founding donors today. I'm really hoping I can count on you to be one of them who will help us start this campaign off strong so we can be ready for whatever happens next.** ******[Can you chip in any amount now and stand with Terry?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwabY24PRgsRxRRqWDBcJODJwlCP0tNICErHwm4-EUJjMG6A6IK_KYr3qfJun9jMXFIF9tMbQsLByzNouYz7JLnjLPMIgXBS1P1vUmnKS_8_VWa4AtH3nwfBv4DmiFK57XHQhZ1XG_I4n9nx6N_9J2mJsLa7vNRjxiMZGRK57o17HRB87trWEpBICI0YoWFzk-9E1teQZZwnLu3kpp1ZNO7gv0GpaxTTJRKY-MlAa-WP-RQzDG_xblPZTYpNLpf49uXJR6KLitwCriBytkmmLCmEzeiGiK1y6XUMqngiiraer0nv_z9ShrrVbWKwBsE3EbueZFXx2XiMDIncQ1HS3-Sm6DIWVuYRcsMBNg3IN8oTxg/37k/UJE6p1yHQa2kAKZ3WpVcrA/h1/m4ICsBYEw4HP52dZCKy2Dnmq3n0horDZdzyhKTHmi2k)** **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwZclMuwNXZUqc1HUYlh7HxIgvnyDcYwCZ_-4luym8Yd2Jz-6ryqWgGU3Eo4fzirNubudBWwbIi-2GIewReFwQFxuuNNEqkwi4tmWByeAyappQc1l_zxjixjQVpGctl5G8V-NhyLquJxJtnvEKQ30-TPVtzfisBYhx_lUchC2QhOkPBT4bfGEoR19vI882MlooT2jqIcFLJJID6tRhN08AcwZMun4P7e8MzhcKF-Z6TjAmbxSurYFZvWwyGvtwtnNl0U9GG0NrV_Z28b0ozXdTExCknSP-Rbz2TC5_Of-Y6NqszlmA6EMBL6Zrk6McrjyhPY9XiU487LxFGEcDifkKnl18argIpljXAZlIfnLRJF1Q/37k/UJE6p1yHQa2kAKZ3WpVcrA/h2/Xlt514by6022YpFX_ERL4FVKi9xxdiMDrp4ChV7CjJo)****** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwaKsxsYgpKfqf-OO4qbMO-spSd_L2_r0UK6vITo_JhNScvZYX03uNIGuIAzBRAV8GKz_7dTTS4WqK4ow2khoALrQhbP9aRNXMdajBmTarwdSPw5Th5knfh2KJVqbcmR9qm4oVFVldHWk906b13NGeIxSDThlpazanSabYfTm8TLBKDMQoWtRRwiCZSmdJE9_iievd0UbewYhmmcvYjpr6OjRHANKiAF3Tf5bO0hF-KNTUzBGJJ3IlsQ-7vtXAaRQEjZd4KKCfA5UkLzOgR6PzE5M0njFA9RP43oYWvNl54H72v2RCGVZXLmXJk7m1mnk0QjGmqxfEm0hdEHms3Ft-ptS9w-ga9oe3yop7asM_0q6g/37k/UJE6p1yHQa2kAKZ3WpVcrA/h3/_QlHIgi4zbWDWEVlybK8fe7z4NdcARhTsMHbJVCkDAY)

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: ICYMI: Wellness Wednesdays
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
The past nine months have weighed heavily on all of us -- this is a time of unparalleled stress and anxiety. You should know that Rhode Island is here to help. Last week, I joined the Education Operations Center and the Rhode Island Department of Education for their Wellness Wednesdays series to talk about some of the resources available to you to help manage your mental health during this challenging time.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014qGTLAdniNT1D4MyZeliASLd_tw-3VSLS_4gH3V8SI1j-ZsVG0ye6YYnZYI_Vi6UTW6cTPIW9-kaWQrgu5KnZ61b-Eh48zbRkVDQx3hKvByH1XTuJzh0j9R_ttVhuylQCYGNL1559BJFI5NN5shUZl5Lpx3djCkNQ5ruZhHQn1N6Nj16Ki33lw==&c=wGk2hIrsXgDh-vHCAl30N72puD0uL7ySoA-ILFrDmLRHKrvb5ZAyRA==&ch=FV_9-roWBBBVU1gOoNOpzE-RANZHvOz19bod3mN02vjsrk6nf3xJ6w==)
---
| We covered a wide range of topics about Rhode Island's response to the pandemic and our variety of mental health supports for Rhode Islanders, especially teachers and children. I hope you'll take some time to watch. You can see more videos from the Rhode Island Department of Education, including the rest of their Wellness Wednesdays series, on their [YouTube page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014qGTLAdniNT1D4MyZeliASLd_tw-3VSLS_4gH3V8SI1j-ZsVG0ye6YYnZYI_Vi6ULlc-yRxwRr3ywCiQhO7tKRSwKJsxT-iQF1DCMBrc_Brqj0en8tnbJLGP37LexFMO1aID5R5Dgnlg5f2f8Jif6nkgFryJjCP2akjZG7LzGX671zzmpBaQU3wUbRbpCe2j90Vh409dtr8=&c=wGk2hIrsXgDh-vHCAl30N72puD0uL7ySoA-ILFrDmLRHKrvb5ZAyRA==&ch=FV_9-roWBBBVU1gOoNOpzE-RANZHvOz19bod3mN02vjsrk6nf3xJ6w==).
If you need mental health support, visit [BHLink.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014qGTLAdniNT1D4MyZeliASLd_tw-3VSLS_4gH3V8SI1j-ZsVG0ye6YYnZYI_Vi6UWrwLs43l5XpUcmAuYnnUw06JEY2iZK7ohwCIJKNoS6N_X1Ysq7BMEzH29IafnnHZsjOs6CXWEP8=&c=wGk2hIrsXgDh-vHCAl30N72puD0uL7ySoA-ILFrDmLRHKrvb5ZAyRA==&ch=FV_9-roWBBBVU1gOoNOpzE-RANZHvOz19bod3mN02vjsrk6nf3xJ6w==) to learn more about the options available to you. And if you have a child who is struggling, please visit [Kids' Link Rhode Island](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014qGTLAdniNT1D4MyZeliASLd_tw-3VSLS_4gH3V8SI1j-ZsVG0ye6T817xdw6stEXIpByhnUQWaJsi7sXn19EFmD4rRLvumLXIhkwcRLQQOUhja3BqniIlz-8kHxZn5qVkQB5ZdvPkz9oDoEhFzgsWiCwF0ZITjv8f17nPVI8qzeeSfWbRdMCNATMLGp0l7G&c=wGk2hIrsXgDh-vHCAl30N72puD0uL7ySoA-ILFrDmLRHKrvb5ZAyRA==&ch=FV_9-roWBBBVU1gOoNOpzE-RANZHvOz19bod3mN02vjsrk6nf3xJ6w==). This is a difficult time for all of us, but please know that Rhode Island has your back.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, The past nine months have weighed heavily on all of us -- this is a time of unparalleled stress and anxiety. You should know that Rhode Island is here to help. Last week, I joined the Education Operations Center and the Rhode Island Department of Education for their Wellness Wednesdays series to talk about some of the resources available to you to help manage your mental health during this challenging time. | == | We covered a wide range of topics about Rhode Island's response to the pandemic and our variety of mental health supports for Rhode Islanders, especially teachers and children. I hope you'll take some time to watch. You can see more videos from the Rhode Island Department of Education, including the rest of their Wellness Wednesdays series, on their ==. If you need mental health support, visit == to learn more about the options available to you. And if you have a child who is struggling, please visit ==. This is a difficult time for all of us, but please know that Rhode Island has your back. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001s2GdzZYXli-pbTto7HnjA6S8NoUWuOT8AcwQOpk1RKv405NF_RTp2CmiZpS2w7oxuNDiiflGn0lX1obaucm9qdTPvYj6kAuPYFjI8B54JOeXKNQFI3ZEfMd4JSGN6I4o0R0Xisi5VWwP2E_4Ayf7V6Zp4OtZRbQWwjNpK6mEWGBYR-XzDUc1NReF6NMng0RJ&c=POsIwjP8iUz8NFHodXJ4mdtT-VDbHvdauKKvYkTLBs1T5MnIW_DKQw==&ch=RVRDKK7JWaKh6-_TTGeKOJtBxH75s4ccSbe5utKcLNRYTzeRIh8cuA==)

| Peter,
To be the best Congressman that I can be, tough decisions have to be made. I must make every decision based on what is right for the American people, even if doesn't benefit me. That's why I've chosen to reject all donations from corporate PACs and their lobbyists, the only Republican in Congress to do so!

| We must put the interests of Americans over the special interests in Washington D.C., and return power back to the hands of the people. Our government has been handed over to the globalist and international corporations who want to ship our jobs to China and watch the middle of our country waste away.
Since I am the only Republican in Congress who won't take corporate PAC money, I am funded only by Patriots like you.
I will need your support to take on these giant corporations chipping away at our rights, so I'm asking that you DONATE TODAY so I can continue to work for you!

name: Warner HQ
subject: at every turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
President Trump is damaging our democracy.
|
---

| | Derek --

At every turn, Mark Warner has fought to safeguard our elections, protect our democracy, and restore the American people's trust in our political process.

At every turn, Donald Trump has undermined the results of a legitimate election, spread lies and conspiracy theories, and sought to overturn the will of the American people.

**[Will you add your name to this petition calling on Trump to stop destroying trust in our democratic process?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d961/53d9897e/553ce7de/1c88d5ea/1191794019/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-electionresults")**
* For weeks after the election, Trump prevented his General Services Administration from ascertaining Joe Biden as the president-elect. This could have done **_real harm_** to our national security by disrupting the critical transition between administrations.

* Trump's lawyers have spent the post-election period filing (and losing) absurd, evidence-free legal challenges to election results, **_even as states certify their elections and name Joe Biden as the clear winner._**

* Trump has also embarked on a deeply anti-democratic campaign by pressuring Gov. Brian Kemp of Georgia and GOP state legislators from GA, PA, MI, AZ, and more to **_overturn the election in his favor._**

All of these actions damage our democracy and harm our nation. President Trump must stop. Now.

**[Please sign the petition.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d961/53d9897e/553ce7de/1c88d5ea/1191794019/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-electionresults")**

-- Team Warner
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d961/53d9897e/553ce7de/1c88d5e9/1191794019/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20201209_p_1_fl__951__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d961/53d9897e/553ce7de/1c88d5e8/1191794019/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

Friend,

This may be the most important email I ever send you.

I want to provide an update on our ongoing efforts to expose the tremendous voting irregularities that took place during the ridiculously long November 3rd Election.

As President, I have no higher duty than to defend the laws of the Constitution of the United States. That is why I am determined to protect our Election system - which is under attack - but I cannot do it alone. I need YOUR HELP.

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
In the days and weeks after the Election, we witnessed an orchestrated effort by the Left to name Joe Biden as the winner - while many key states were still counting votes. It was madness.

Bottom line, we are going to defend the honesty of the vote, ensuring every LEGAL ballot is COUNTED, and that NO ILLEGAL ballot is counted.
This is about more than just honoring the votes of 74 MILLION Americans who voted for me. It’s about ensuring that Americans can have faith in this Election, and in all future Elections.

My grandmother taught me to give what I had. As always, she led by example, welcoming anyone in need into our home. I can’t remember a time when someone from our community wasn’t sleeping on our couch -- even though we barely had enough to get by ourselves.
---
That’s why I’ve dedicated my life to public service.
---
As a public defender, I fought for Virginia’s most vulnerable and personally helped people break out of cycles of poverty, addiction, and homelessness.
---
As a foster mom, I nurtured and raised two children and ensured they excelled in school -- even while working my own way through law school.
---
As a Delegate, I won bipartisan victories for women, veterans, our environment, our teachers, and our children.
---
**I’m running for governor because I have more to give.[If you’re with me, I’m asking you to chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us close the gap. Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg and was one of the first Black women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute. Jennifer then served as a public defender and foster mom. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her two terms as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth's most vulnerable communities. clean_body: | | Former governor Terry McAuliffe JUST jumped in the governor’s race, and he’s starting out with a massive $2 million fundraising haul. My grandmother taught me to give what I had. As always, she led by example, welcoming anyone in need into our home. I can’t remember a time when someone from our community wasn’t sleeping on our couch -- even though we barely had enough to get by ourselves. That’s why I’ve dedicated my life to public service. As a public defender, I fought for Virginia’s most vulnerable and personally helped people break out of cycles of poverty, addiction, and homelessness. As a foster mom, I nurtured and raised two children and ensured they excelled in school -- even while working my own way through law school. As a Delegate, I won bipartisan victories for women, veterans, our environment, our teachers, and our children. I’m running for governor because I have more to give. I know we can win this race by building up a grassroots movement that uplifts every Virginian and empowers working families -- it just takes folks like you stepping up and investing in our future. Thank you, Jennifer Carroll Foy | Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg and was one of the first Black women to graduate from the Virginia Military Institute. Jennifer then served as a public defender and foster mom. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her two terms as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth's most vulnerable communities. Jennifer is committed to creating a Virginia that works for everyone. Help her make Virginia's future better than its past. | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor, please .

Did you hear the news, Derek? Terry just announced he's running to be the next Governor of Virginia. **Terry's running to deliver bold leadership and big ideas to the people of Virginia -- that means a historic investment in Virginia’s education system and a plan to beat COVID-19 and rebuild our economy for an even stronger future.** **We set a goal to find 2,500 founding donors for our campaign before midnight tonight.** **[Will you join our team by chipping in $50 or whatever you can afford and ensure we kick this campaign off on the right foot?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwaC0nmlDDNa468-_t4m0pRGm00ianwifbvFkiLuutpFEBXePNNd859JrIoQXB1QyQ0W_aEsuWMxkvAPttXfrEsuvHr2fp_zV8l8j6u76SNoYENon2fg3BVqDLCmLYGlTxOIsYutPmYIjsKmcySS12C6nKRiXtsr_qkdAR-Y4hX23h6KeMDCHG7ZFuZXADWkPKWfNmPseKr37LxTIBK75GzLsK0lEq3AZH2X8m_cdmclZ7mfPV-d7PN1O36d8Ck1I_JkvD7igBEvQsHgpBHgu5bW/37k/wxy_Q2UMQP2qcuxWkr0MaQ/h1/nBkpFn6uiDLXxsxCj3USbzG5JfdXs958MP8WddIHuOM)** Thanks for joining us. We're attaching Terry's message below so you can read it, \- Team McAuliffe _
_ _\---Forwarded message---_ Derek, I’ll get right to the point: **Derek, I'm announcing that I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia and I’m humbly asking for your support.** **[Please chip in anything you can afford right now and become one of the very first donors to my campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwa2IkXHDb6Ao3FSYDw241zLBD54sNCPBJqZvhcgteYnepw20VSeppGGorAqY3ysUkzRYGpMJT365VRs8Zp3xz5Tu91-o6S-ktr6x3xs6t4u7oZ-nQe2oVft8HgMZ-5GB-xiE83yb5fYr3PkBd2px0kskNV3s0rcubmrt8l3qI8c1_2yxZ3V26SPPO7qEh569widPlHrm9S-U6KsLHFve0Yv94IZpfe7zSSbuDVRmPtjQr_CRRA26Daaoi7VGuxnsMDtW8iFBcjNrJ1okrY7XH6N/37k/wxy_Q2UMQP2qcuxWkr0MaQ/h2/hgb6pvFoT5RC9M4kiwyrszx2-p5ow817udORyMSx9Wk)** If you know me, you know I’m an eternal optimist. But even I can’t sugarcoat it: 2020 was a tough year. To defeat COVID-19 and build an economy that truly works for all Virginians, we can’t just go back to business as usual. We need to think big, be bold, and approach our challenges never before if we’re going to move the Commonwealth forward. I’m running to be that bold leader. That’s why I’m making my announcement at an elementary school today -- I am committed to making a historic investment in Virginia’s students, schools, and educators so we can finally ensure an equitable, world-class education for every Virginia child. I want to create good 21st Century jobs and build a future that lifts up all Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Our future can’t wait. This pandemic has given us big challenges, but it’s also given us a big opportunity. It’s up to us to make it count - and I know we can do it together, just like we have before. **Because you fought by my side, we defeated radical, right-wing forces who wanted to take Virginia backward. We defended women’s rights and access to healthcare, created 200,000 good-paying jobs, and restored voting rights to hundreds of thousands of Virginians.** Mine was the most progressive administration in the history of the Commonwealth and it’s because of grassroots supporters like you. With so much on the line, it’s more important than ever for us to stop these forces again. With you by my side, I know we can do it. **Derek, I hope I can count on your support again today.****[If you're with me, please, make sure our campaign gets off on the right foot. Will you chip in whatever you can now and help us start this morning strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwZDzru2m-20p-hQUq8yo-9NOMXJHhpjdI8akLc1fSwpZJNQE3zO0-8ccem1eQ1C_2LwqsPZ3CaL0tsFS2T0zTMoLuONbXf2vw-8M8PsVa_MxiIb0tARKfysZI9eoAtNaiI13sYwc7EZHJWCOmJQNZ18LfXZ2VLqVel9fVmydYKV2WIuJxFSktWwtxgWwZvATqoHZOJOynWUcCpGdfZXTOjfdjEkjkzhX2OqcFCKrwNiDxYtKh-sme_GccwF4NYpE0-6kmMcgJS1Im2ZXm7emHCe/37k/wxy_Q2UMQP2qcuxWkr0MaQ/h3/R65dhhI0wxpTdUvJa-eQA3ESOQClvfzS--OUJApgwCQ)** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkWXX4Ox-fFRKtfXnatbAGOSWs3SDuwQO9C_uKMIfhDwbTmtlXyKbX63AHcw3F3t8GkMvQSDHUitcVvmwK_t1ttIn427cPdpk4MZq0GRJUEVqdfJcSwH_MQYkODbpSRckaUH6RYYUAROZSEURc2rhGS-_Sib9Zq3FyJ_oS2DUwglvJNylknCGBS8bbN6O3SciIanWgQDfcOF5CKTbuAeuatP0fKvcYsUWj8pGnYeDr7WHiSUXgpLB5E2L21HOIafmJXu_WS6cmLvuwW0aPeJK92LgCH-5YKVwG1Vc1ilG_2dsV-ymRuDCyIO-exbgN0Cji3NvJT-_oO4Uv3x0Q83-QtQ/37k/wxy_Q2UMQP2qcuxWkr0MaQ/h4/0k-tXMD1uDglOnwJYh74QXQIbscBk9PtJfiIs31i7m8)
